landing.title: Sana Malik Shaikh
landing.tagline: Vision for a Stronger Tomorrow, Built on Unity and Progress
landing.description: MLA, Anushakti Nagar — serving constituents with transparency and care

hero.subtitle: Born and raised in Mumbai, Sana Malik Shaikh brings together architecture, law, and public service to uplift women, youth, and every family in the constituency.
hero.roles: Mother · Homemaker · Architect · Lawyer · Entrepreneur · Social reformer · NCP spokesperson · Trustee, Rehbar & Dadamiya Foundation

landing.quote: Public service is not just a responsibility — it's a privilege. Every voice matters, and every citizen deserves to be heard.

about.sectionSubtitle: A life rooted in Mumbai, dedicated to unity, progress, and public service.
about.bio: Sana Malik Shaikh hails from a family of farmers who migrated from Dhuswa, Uttar Pradesh, in the 1950s. Her education and life lessons were shaped by Mumbai's diverse and vibrant culture. She began her professional journey as an architect and later earned an LLB degree, building a strong foundation across architecture, law, business, and social reform.
about.bioContinued: Today she serves as MLA for Anushakti Nagar, spokesperson for the Maharashtra wing of the Nationalist Congress Party (NCP), and trustee of the Rehbar Foundation and Dadamiya Foundation — working every day for social justice, education, economic opportunity, and community well-being.

mla.title: Elected MLA, 2024
mla.description: Elected MLA from Anushakti Nagar with 49,341 votes — among 78 first-time MLAs in the Maharashtra Assembly.

spokesperson.title: NCP spokesperson
spokesperson.description: Appointed spokesperson for the Maharashtra wing of the Nationalist Congress Party in 2024.

committees.title: Assembly committees, 2025
committees.description: Member of the Minority Welfare Committee and the Women & Child Committee.

legacy.title: Continuing public service
legacy.description: Decades of community work — from student organizing and hospital advocacy to election campaigns and constituency leadership.

vision.sectionSubtitle: Building a more equitable environment for women, youth, and every citizen of Anushakti Nagar.
vision.intro: Sana Malik Shaikh has dedicated her political career to addressing complex challenges in social justice, education, and economic opportunity. Her vision centers on fostering empowerment and creating a more equitable environment for women and youth across five core focus areas.

socialReform.title: Social reform
socialReform.description: Uplifting marginalized communities and ensuring access to fundamental rights for all.

education.title: Educational development
education.description: Enhancing education and creating skill development opportunities for youth.

economy.title: Economic growth
economy.description: Advocating for job creation, supporting small businesses, and promoting financial independence, especially for women.

awareness.title: Political awareness
awareness.description: Empowering women and youth to actively participate in shaping their futures.

wellbeing.title: Psychological well-being
wellbeing.description: Raising mental health awareness and providing support systems for community wellness.

health.title: Community health & welfare
health.description: Improving healthcare access and promoting well-being, especially for underserved communities.

journey.sectionSubtitle: From student leadership and community advocacy to the Maharashtra Legislative Assembly.

y2006.description: Organized a candle march with students after the 7/11 Mumbai train bombings — Azad Maidan, Mumbai.
